description: Starter for legal / regulatory advisory projects. Anchored on case-law lineage and regulatory communication discipline.

modules.name: case_law_references
modules.trigger: every case cited in advice or analysis

audit.completeness_rule: every entry has citation AND jurisdiction AND relevance_score AND summary AND used_in_artifact
audit.particular_audit: every advisory artifact citing a case emits a corresponding entry
audit.global_audit: monthly: surface citations with relevance_score>=4 not consulted in last 90 days

modules.name: regulatory_correspondence
modules.trigger: every communication with regulator or counterparty

audit.completeness_rule: every entry has direction AND subject AND summary
audit.particular_audit: any decisions.md ADR mentioning a regulator or client emits a candidate entry
audit.global_audit: every 30 days: surface received items with no follow-up

modules.name: precedent_chains

format_alternatives.rationale: recursive CTE handles ≤2-hop traversal cleanly; no extra deps
adjacency-list with source_id/target_id/edge_type; multi-hop becomes O(N) per query

modules.tier_b_fallback: jsonl adjacency-list at memory/precedent_chains.jsonl with explicit source_id/target_id/edge_type/confidence_pct
modules.trigger: every advisory recommendation derived from precedent

fields.name: edges_to
fields.rationale: outgoing edges with calibrated confidence per edge

audit.completeness_rule: every node has edges_to.length>=1 (advisory) OR is reachable from ≥1 advisory (precedent); every edge has confidence_pct
audit.particular_audit: advisory artifacts traverse to ≥1 precedent within 3 hops
audit.global_audit: low-confidence edges (<50%) surface for human review; orphan precedents (in-degree 0) flagged after 3 sessions
audit.requires_format_capability: multi-hop traversal (graph_db native; sqlite via recursive CTE; jsonl as last-resort adjacency-list with O(N) traversal cost)

modules.name: jurisdiction_mapping
modules.trigger: every change in jurisdictional applicability per matter

audit.completeness_rule: every matter has applicable_jurisdictions AND applicable_laws AND last_reviewed_at
audit.particular_audit: matter onboarding emits a fresh entry
audit.global_audit: alert when last_reviewed_at older than 6 months

modules.name: client_advisory_history
modules.trigger: every piece of advice given (with disclaimers)

audit.completeness_rule: every entry has advice_summary AND disclaimers.length>=1 AND confidence_pct
audit.particular_audit: every client-facing artifact emits a candidate entry

notes: Disclaimers are mandatory in client_advisory_history; absence is a BLOCKER (professional-duty floor).
